summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Style Tracker feature - All major features working correctly including backend APIs and frontend UI integration

minor_issues.issue: Requires transcripts to generate hooks (expected behavior)
minor_issues.impact: User must add videos before generating hooks

passed_tests: Style Tracker page loads correctly with title and description
Sidebar shows Style Tracker tab with proper highlighting
Add Account dialog appears with all required form fields
Platform selector (TikTok, Instagram, YouTube options)
Account URL input field with placeholder
Account Name input field
Account Handle input field with @handle placeholder
Check frequency selector (Daily, Weekly, Biweekly options)
Form submission creates tracked account successfully
Success notification displays after account creation
Tracked account appears in list with correct information
Account card shows name, handle, analysis status, and frequency
Account details view accessible by clicking account card
Back button returns to main Style Tracker view
Analyze All button triggers analysis functionality
Analysis completion notification displays
POST /api/tracked-accounts creates account with profile_id
GET /api/tracked-accounts returns all tracked accounts
GET /api/tracked-accounts?profile_id={id} filters by profile
GET /api/tracked-accounts/{id} returns single account details
POST /api/tracked-accounts/{id}/analyze triggers analysis (returns 0 videos with mock URL as expected)
GET /api/profiles/{id}/style-insights returns insights data structure
PUT /api/tracked-accounts/{id} updates account settings
DELETE /api/tracked-accounts/{id} removes account (tested in cleanup)
Profile data isolation - tracked accounts filtered by profile_id
All existing backend endpoints still functional (23/24 tests passed)

success_percentage.backend: 96% - 23/24 API endpoints tested successfully (1 expected failure for hooks without transcripts)
success_percentage.frontend: 100% - All Style Tracker UI components and workflows functional
